<?php namespace Cviebrock\EloquentSluggable\Tests\Models; use Cocur\Slugify\Slugify; /** * Class PostWithForeignRuleset. * * A test model that customizes the Slugify engine with a foreign ruleset. */ class PostWithForeignRuleset extends Post { /** * {@inheritDoc} */ public function customizeSlugEngine(Slugify $engine, string $attribute): Slugify { $engine->activateRuleSet('esperanto'); return $engine; } }
